---
title: "Datum"
---

<meta name="slot-title-class" content="slot-title-datum">

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }

  const cls = document.querySelector('meta[name="slot-title-class"]')?.content;
  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");
  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```



## Jahr

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ḥꜣ.t-sp* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/01_Jahr/0001_HA.t-sp_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Regierungsjahr </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Monat

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜣbd-1* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0001_Abd-1_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> erster Monat </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *dpy* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0010_tpy_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> erster Monat </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜣbd-2* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0020_Abd-2_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0030_Abd-2_02.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0035_Abd-2_03.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> zweiter Monat </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜣbd-3* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0040_Abd-3_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0050_Abd-3_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> dritter Monat </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜣbd-4* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0060_Abd-4_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/02_Monat/0070_Abd-4_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> vierter Monat </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Jahreszeiten

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *ꜣḫ.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/03_Jahreszeiten/0001_Ax.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Überschwemmungszeit </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *pr.t* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/03_Jahreszeiten/0010_pr.t_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Winter </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *šm.w* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/03_Jahreszeiten/0020_Smw_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Sommer </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>


## Tag

<div class='tableFixHead table-glyph-middle'><table class="table">
 <thead>
  <tr>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Transkription </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Hieroglyphen </th>
   <th style="text-align:left;"> Übersetzung </th>
  </tr>
 </thead>
<tbody>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sw* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/04_Tag/0001_sw_01.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Tag </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> *sw-ꜥrqy* </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/04_Tag/0010_sw-arqy_01.png){.glyph} <br> ![](/assets/glyphs/02_Slots/Datum/04_Tag/0020_sw-arqy_02.png){.glyph} </td>
   <td style="text-align:left;"> Tag 30 </td>
  </tr>
</tbody>
</table></div>



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
